holo_siren.name: Holo-Siren
holo_siren.description: A dancer of pure light, all curve and shimmer, whose looping song slides straight into your neural lace and asks you to stay.

chrome_vixen.name: Chrome Vixen
chrome_vixen.description: A gynoid with a predator's grace and a showgirl's smile, mirror-polished and moving like she's always mid-performance.

static_nymph.name: Static Nymph
static_nymph.description: She flickers between wall sockets in a dress of loose current, giggling in white noise, leaving lipstick burns on the conduits.

vent_dryad.name: Vent Dryad
vent_dryad.description: An androgynous spore-being grown around the air system, willowy and languid, exhaling sweetness you know better than to breathe.

cryo_duelist.name: Cryo Duelist
cryo_duelist.description: A fencer sculpted from living ice, androgynous and elegant, who salutes before every bout and means it.

plasma_dancer.name: Plasma Dancer
plasma_dancer.description: She burns in slow motion, trailing veils of fire like silk, and every step closer raises the temperature two degrees.

neural_temptress.name: Neural Temptress
neural_temptress.description: She never moves. She doesn't need to. The whisper arrives already inside your head, wearing your own voice, asking you to lower your guard.

razor_doll.name: Razor Doll
razor_doll.description: A porcelain-faced automaton in a ballerina's frame, beautiful until the fans of blades unfold from her sleeves.

ion_valkyrie.name: Ion Valkyrie
ion_valkyrie.description: Winged in charged plasma, tall and radiant, she descends like judgment with a smile that says she's already chosen you.

synth_medusa.name: Synth Medusa
synth_medusa.description: Fiber-optic serpents crown her like living jewelry. Meet her gaze and your HUD starts agreeing with everything she says.

mirage_twins.name: Mirage Twins
mirage_twins.description: Two identical figures sharing one shadow, finishing each other's movements, and only one of them is ever really there.

inferno_diva.name: Inferno Diva
inferno_diva.description: An opera of heat in a gown of magma-glass. Her high note melts bulkheads; her encore is worse.

warden_lyss.name: Warden Lyss
warden_lyss.description: The Substrate's self-appointed jailer — statuesque, frost-armored, achingly formal. She'd rather you surrendered. She always asks nicely first.

overclock_queen.name: Overclock Queen
overclock_queen.description: A regal figure on a throne of stripped processors, crowned in arcing current, ruling a court of humming fans. She thinks you're a fascinating peripheral.

spore_matriarch.name: Spore Matriarch
spore_matriarch.description: Mother to every bloom in the deep vents — vast, serene, and terribly fond of visitors. Her garden keeps whoever falls asleep in it.

chrome_contessa.name: The Chrome Contessa
chrome_contessa.description: Nobility of the upper Substrate: a towering gynoid aristocrat in liquid-metal couture, flanked by curtseying drones. She duels every guest personally. It would be rude not to.

neon_seraph.name: Neon Seraph
neon_seraph.description: Six wings of pure signal, a halo of warning glyphs, and a face you're sure you've seen in an ad you can't remember. Being noticed by her feels like sunburn.

substrate_empress.name: The Substrate Empress
substrate_empress.description: The deepest dream of the machine beneath the city, wearing a crown of every lost signal Nexus ever swallowed. She has been expecting you — she says it like an old friend would.
